text:
[SHEET: RFP ODDO BHF]
Unnamed: 0 Unnamed: 1 Unnamed: 2 Unnamed: 3 Unnamed: 4 Unnamed: 5
 
 Procurement REF: 15_2025 
 Job Title System Administrator 
 Job Title's Detail OpenShift Administrator 
 Department IT Infrastructure & IT Operations 
 
 Company Name 
 Identifier of profile 
 Answer date 
 Nb years of experience\nexcl intershipts / etc 
 
 Answer established with the candidate 
 Reason for the termination of the last experience 
 Feedback/reference of previous client 
 
 Freelance / Employee 
 If freelance, how many years have you (the company) worked with the freelance ? 
 Daily rate( €/d excl. taxes) 
 
 
 Context The OpenShift platform is already installed and operational across production, pre-production, and development environments.\nThe priority is to strengthen operations, improve reliability, and evolve the platform to higher levels of automation, observability, and security.\n\nThe administrator will play a key role in:\n- Stabilizing and optimizing existing clusters\n- Defining and implementing best practices\n- Migration to Bar Metal environment\n- Driving platform enhancements and upgrades\n- Ensuring compliance with organizational and regulatory requirements 
 Matching assessment
 Background Profile experience must meet the minimal requirements: Input a value from 0 (min) to 3 (max)
 Experience in Linux systems administration and containerized environments 0..1
 Solid hands-on expertise in running and managing Kubernetes/OpenShift clusters 0..3
 Strong experience in critical production environments 0..3
 
 Detailed roles Expectations Matching assessment
 
 Ensure the availability, stability, and performance of OpenShift clusters 0..0
 Manage user access, quotas, namespaces, and related resources 0..3
 Lead and support the migration to bare metal environment 0..3
 Implement and maintain monitoring, observability, and logging solutions 0..3
 Enforce and improve security policies 0..3
 Contribute to cluster upgrades, enhancements, and lifecycle management 0..3
 
 Education Bac +5 graduated input the name and year of graduation
 
 Expected skills Knowledge foundation 
 OpenShift (administration, operators, networking, storage, monitoring) 0..3
 Kubernetes (core resources, architecture) 0..3
 Linux systems (RHEL or equivalent) 0..3
 Networking (TCP/IP, load balancer, DNS, ingress) 0..3
 Security (certificates, RBAC, policies, vulnerability scanning) 0..3
 CI/CD integration with OpenShift Pipelines 0..3
 Observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana …) 0..3
 
 Skills foundation 
 English proficiency 0..3
 Git and GitOps practices (ArgoCD, FluxCD) 0..3
 Advanced troubleshooting (logs, metrics, network and application debugging) 0..3
 Cluster upgrades and security patching 0..3
 
 Mindset foundation 
 Pedagogy, good communication 0..3
 Reliability and resilience-oriented mindset 0..3
 Strong collaboration with developers, ops, and security teams 0..3
 Ability to work autonomously and make decisions during incidents 0..3
 
 Optional bonus criterias 
 Red Hat Certified Specialist in OpenShift Administration 0..3
 Experience designing and operating multi-cluster architectures 0..3
 Familiarity with public cloud providers (AWS, Azure, GCP) 0..3
 Experience in migration on bare metal infrastructure 0..3
 
 Estimated duration of the mission 1 year 
 
 Start date Q4 2025 input the estimated starting date
 
 
 Workplace\n- \nRemote work 5 Rue du General Leclerc, Clichy la Garenne

 2
 3

tasks: Assurer la disponibilité, la stabilité et l'optimisation des clusters OpenShift
Définir et implémenter les meilleures pratiques
Mener et supporter la migration vers un environnement Bare Metal
Contribuer aux évolutions, aux mises à niveau et à la gestion du cycle de vie de la plateforme
Assurer la conformité aux exigences organisationnelles et réglementaires
Gérer l'accès des utilisateurs, les quotas, les namespaces et les ressources associées
Implémenter et maintenir les solutions de monitoring, d'observabilité et de logging
Appliquer et améliorer les politiques de sécurité
